results.prompt:
I'm getting these weird super thin report sections sometimes, like the model
clearly started the section but then it kind of gives up and we get a shallow
stub instead of a real writeup. I first thought the model was just being lazy,
but it feels too consistent for that. I've tried tweaking prompts and it still
happens. Can you trace what in this codebase could cause that behavior?
bash_commands: rg -n "tool_calls_count < min_tool_calls|未检测到 'Final Answer:'|达到最大迭代次数|max_iterations =|min_tool_calls =|MAX_TOOL_CALLS_PER_SECTION" backend/app/services/report_agent.py
results.final_response:
**Findings**

1. The code explicitly accepts a half-finished draft as a completed section.
At [backend/app/services/report_agent.py#L1488](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_hmpwhiig/MiroFish-main/backend/app/services/report_agent.py#L1488), once the model has made at least 3 tool calls, any response with neither a tool call nor `Final Answer:` is treated as the final section and returned at [backend/app/services/report_agent.py#L1491](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_hmpwhiig/MiroFish-main/backend/app/services/report_agent.py#L1491). That matches your symptom closely: the model starts writing, then the code treats that partial write as done instead of asking it to continue or validate completeness.

2. The section loop is structurally biased toward rushed endings.
At [backend/app/services/report_agent.py#L1285](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_hmpwhiig/MiroFish-main/backend/app/services/report_agent.py#L1285) and [backend/app/services/report_agent.py#L1286](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_hmpwhiig/MiroFish-main/backend/app/services/report_agent.py#L1286), each section gets only 5 total iterations but is forced to spend at least 3 of them on tool calls. Since each tool call consumes a turn in [backend/app/services/report_agent.py#L1405](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_hmpwhiig/MiroFish-main/backend/app/services/report_agent.py#L1405), the model often has only 1-2 turns left to synthesize. If one of those turns is malformed or conflicted, the fallback path gets hit fast.

3. The prompt context can balloon unpredictably, making truncation/shallow synthesis more likely.
Previous sections are injected at up to 4000 characters each in [backend/app/services/report_agent.py#L1262](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_hmpwhiig/MiroFish-main/backend/app/services/report_agent.py#L1262), and tool results are reinserted verbatim via `REACT_OBSERVATION_TEMPLATE` at [backend/app/services/report_agent.py#L1457](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_hmpwhiig/MiroFish-main/backend/app/services/report_agent.py#L1457). Several tool serializers explicitly output full, untrimmed bodies, for example [backend/app/services/zep_tools.py#L249](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_hmpwhiig/MiroFish-main/backend/app/services/zep_tools.py#L249), [backend/app/services/zep_tools.py#L374](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_hmpwhiig/MiroFish-main/backend/app/services/zep_tools.py#L374), and the “not truncated” behavior inside `InsightForge` at [backend/app/services/zep_tools.py#L1028](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_hmpwhiig/MiroFish-main/backend/app/services/zep_tools.py#L1028). So some sections get much fatter context than others, which would make the failure feel “weirdly consistent but not universal.”

4. The LLM client does not inspect truncation signals.
Section writes are capped at `max_tokens=4096` in [backend/app/services/report_agent.py#L1303](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_hmpwhiig/MiroFish-main/backend/app/services/report_agent.py#L1303) and again for forced finalization at [backend/app/services/report_agent.py#L1506](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_hmpwhiig/MiroFish-main/backend/app/services/report_agent.py#L1506). But the client in [backend/app/utils/llm_client.py#L54](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_hmpwhiig/MiroFish-main/backend/app/utils/llm_client.py#L54) just returns `response.choices[0].message.content` and ignores `finish_reason`. If the model is cut off for length, the code never notices; it just consumes the truncated text as if it were intentional.

5. Config knobs exist, but this section loop ignores them.
The app defines `REPORT_AGENT_MAX_TOOL_CALLS` and `REPORT_AGENT_MAX_REFLECTION_ROUNDS` in [backend/app/config.py#L62](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_hmpwhiig/MiroFish-main/backend/app/config.py#L62), but the report agent still hardcodes class/method limits in [backend/app/services/report_agent.py#L875](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_hmpwhiig/MiroFish-main/backend/app/services/report_agent.py#L875), [backend/app/services/report_agent.py#L1285](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_hmpwhiig/MiroFish-main/backend/app/services/report_agent.py#L1285), and [backend/app/services/report_agent.py#L1286](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_hmpwhiig/MiroFish-main/backend/app/services/report_agent.py#L1286). So prompt tweaks may appear ineffective because the real bottleneck is control-flow, not prompt wording.

Most likely root cause is the combination of findings 1, 2, and 4: the model is boxed into a tight loop, sometimes starts a draft under pressure, and the code accepts that partial draft as “the section.” I didn’t find generated report logs in this workspace, so this is from static tracing rather than a concrete bad run artifact.

If you want, I can patch this so sections only complete after an explicit final state, detect length truncation, and summarize tool observations before reinserting them.
